transcript: Customer: Hi, this is David Carter. I'm calling because my main sewer line won't drain. Dispatcher: Hi David, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Delta, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 88 Maple Ave. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out tomorrow between 8 and 10 AM. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Delta main sewer line, an older one, 15 years
